## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss social media strategy and content creation for Branko's personal brand and GrowthX.ai, focusing on LinkedIn with limited budget.](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Branko has a $1K/month personal budget to start, aiming for a "done-with-you" approach](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Focus on LinkedIn initially, with plans to expand to YouTube and newsletter later](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [Main pain points: video editing, post writing, strategy development, and engagement](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [Time constraint: 1-2 hours/week max for Branko's involvement](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)

## Topics

### Current Situation and Goals

  - [Branko recently joined GrowthX.ai (mid-April), company grew from 15 to 70 people since January](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [Aim: Set up a model for social media presence that other directors could follow](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Potential to expense the cost if successful, expanding to other team members](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Balancing personal brand building with company lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)

### Content Strategy and Channels

  - [Initial focus: LinkedIn, then expand to YouTube and newsletter](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [Content growth flywheel concept: consistent messaging across channels](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
  - [Repurposing content: Interview videos → clips for LinkedIn → newsletter content](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - [Inspiration: Kevin Indig's approach (YouTube version of written newsletters)](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)

### Budget and Service Tiers

  - [Starting budget: $1K/month (personal funds)](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [Request for tiered pricing: $1K, $2K, $4K per month options](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Preference for "done-with-you" approach to maintain personal voice](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Potential for local support for "easier" tasks (e.g., video editing, visuals)](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)

### Specific Needs and Constraints

  - [Video processing: Marketing Ops course and Programmatic SEO Guide interviews](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [Post frequency: 2 posts/week ideal, but flexible based on workload](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Time commitment: 1-2 hours/week max (e.g., 1 hour Monday, 1 hour Friday)](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [Key areas for agency support: strategy, post ideation, engagement guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)

### Future Expansion

  - [Plans to start YouTube channel and newsletter](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [Interest in premium newsletter option in the future](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [Potential for employee advocacy program within GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Diandra to send proposal by end of week, including tiered pricing options](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [Branko to confirm potential local support for video editing and visuals](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Discuss and finalize strategy, focusing on LinkedIn initially](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [Begin with processing existing video content for LinkedIn posts](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - [Develop engagement strategy and guidelines for Branko to follow](https://fathom.video/share/DphwDBuXssJ1s32jL6qczrx_9xYyvDFy?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
